name: fable-pack
description: Curated, license-clean plugin pack for Claude Code: knowledge skills, subagents, workflows, and marketing skills. Strict selection: only content a strong model would otherwise get wrong.

plugins.name: fable-knowledge
plugins.description: Knowledge-only skills: exact API schemas, CLI flags, version-specific behavior, platform gotchas

plugins.name: fable-agents
plugins.description: Curated specialist subagents: language experts, reviewers, infrastructure and incident response

plugins.name: fable-workflows
plugins.description: Battle-tested development workflows: TDD, systematic debugging, planning, verification

plugins.name: fable-marketing
plugins.description: Marketing skills with concrete frameworks: CRO, SEO, copywriting, ads, pricing

plugins.name: fable-guard
plugins.description: Opt-in PreToolUse guardrails: block secret leaks and dangerous shell patterns deterministically
